pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add MapStruct library dependency for object mapping.
Add MapStruct processor dependency for annotation processing.
Configure Maven compiler plugin to use Java 21 source and target levels.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit configuration, the compiler might default to an older version or the property might not be picked up correctly by the plugin version used, leading to compilation errors for Java 21 specific syntax.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler plugin to include MapStruct processor in annotation processor paths.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this configuration, MapStruct annotations will not be processed during compilation, resulting in missing generated mapper implementations and compilation errors.
